## Summary

Describe the workflow rule, documentation, or maintainer process changed by this PR.

## Review Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated for workflow behavior changes.
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally.
- [ ] Examples are synthetic and contain no customer data.
- [ ] No credentials, database dumps, uploaded documents, or private screenshots are included.
- [ ] User-facing terminology is understandable for multilingual ERP teams.

## Maintainer Notes

Mention any release, security, or documentation follow-up needed after merge.
